history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 07 column D, facing upward. The cell directly ahead at row 06 column D is safe, while the goal is farther ahead and slightly to the right. Moving forward keeps me progressing toward the open path without entering lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D. The cell directly in front of me is to the north at row 06 column D, and it is safe floor. The lava is to my right-front area, so moving forward is the safest step toward the open space and the goal beyond.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible straight ahead and one cell to the right of my current position. Since I am facing upward, moving forward would go into the safe floor cell at row 06 column D, which brings me closer to the goal. I should advance.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible directly to my right on the same row, and the cell in front of me appears to be a safe floor cell. I need to orient toward the goal by moving into the open space first.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible to my right on the same row, and the cell directly in front of me is safe floor. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal while avoiding the walls and lava-free path.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing upward, and the cell directly ahead is a safe floor cell. The goal is visible farther ahead to the right, but I need to move forward first to navigate toward it. 
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible directly to my right, with a safe floor cell between me and the goal. I am facing upward, so I need to turn right to face the goal path before moving forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible at row 05 column D, directly above me and one cell left of my current column. However, the cell immediately in front of me is safe floor, so I can move forward to get closer while staying away from the lava on the right.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is directly ahead of me in the same column, one cell above. The cell in front is G and is safe, so I should move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
